bluetooth_confirm.title: Add {name}
bluetooth_confirm.description: Confirm the name and BLE address for this Moonboon motor. Address: {address}.

pair_confirm.title: Pair {name}
pair_confirm.description: Press the physical pair button on the Moonboon motor at BLE address {address}. Then enable the checkbox and submit. Home Assistant will verify that it can connect before adding the device.

user.title: Add Moonboon manually
user.description: Enter the BLE address shown by Home Assistant Bluetooth discovery. You will be asked to press the physical pair button on the next step.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect. Press the Moonboon pair button, move the Bluetooth proxy closer, then try again.
error.pair_required: Press the physical Moonboon pair button, then enable the checkbox before submitting.
